jsonLd.title: FreeCharge is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
